title: Trader Locator
description: Easily locate Wandering Traders when they spawn in your world!
body:
# Trader Locator Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition 

## 📖 About
This Datapack is very simple and lightweight, it adds a small message when a Wandering Trader spawns and despawns in your world.


## 📝 Features
When a Wandering Trader spawns in the world a message of "A Wandering Trader has appeared at XYZ" will pop in chat with the coordinates it spawned at.

When the Wandering Trader despawns and leaves a message of "The Wandering Trader has disappeared for now."


## 📂 Installation
Be sure to install this Datapack to the right location or it will not work properly. 

The *correct* file path is **saves/[world]/datapacks** 

## ℹ️ Extra Information
I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but **never** required.

## 👾 Issues
Please report any Datapack issues to the Discord Server, or on the [Github page](https://github.com/The-Atlas-Hub/Trader-Locator/issues).
